name: revert_pr1615
description:
Revert the 10 substantive commits of pytensor#1615 ("Speedup FusionOptimizer") on top of pytensor@main. The cosmetic 11th commit ("Use more direct imports in rewriting/elemwise.py") is excluded.
The patches under experiments/patches/revert_pr1615/ were generated from a manual ``git revert -X theirs`` pass (conflicts in elemwise.py and test_elemwise.py were resolved in favour of the pre-PR state), then captured with ``git format-patch`` so CI can reproduce the state deterministically without re-running conflict resolution.
Previous local run (base vs reverted, small models) showed BEST compile_time +57% and time_eval +58% under the revert — i.e. PR #1615 is worth ~60% on both compile and eval for elemwise-heavy graphs.
